insufficient_dine_credits_wallet: Not enough Dine Credits. Open Settings → Dine Credits to top up.
invite_create_public_desc: A discoverable invitation others can browse and join.
invite_create_private_desc: Invite specific guests with a private link.
invite_create_dating_desc: A dating-style invitation for matched dining.
media_dinebuddies_venue_cover_hint: Optional: use the cover image from the business profile you selected — not from map listings.
video_library_hint: Your selfie video is saved. Tap to use it on the card, or delete it permanently to record or upload a different one.
business_create_subtitle: Choose what you want to publish
business_create_featured_desc: Create a regular or featured business post.
seo.title: DineBuddies | Premium Social Dining
seo.description: DineBuddies is an exclusive social dining network where food lovers meet, join private restaurant invitations, and connect over premium meals.
story_owner_privacy_note: Only you can see these replies
story_viewer_privacy_note: Visible only to you and the story owner
story_interaction_hint_private: Your reply is private between you and the story owner
story_owner_hint: This is your story. Open comments to see audience reactions.
venue_google_search_hint: Search by Google Places within your detected city.
try_osm_places_hint: Search all places (OpenStreetMap) for unregistered venues
business_login_only: This login is for business accounts only. Use Google, Facebook, or Apple on the personal login page.
login_hub_subtitle_business: Sign in with your business email and password.
login_hub_subtitle_personal: Sign in with Google, Facebook, or Apple — personal accounts only.
biz_plan_checkout_missing: Paid plan is not configured. Please contact support.
biz_plan_paid_banner_suffix: /month — full manual feature set. Buy Dine Credits for AI.
biz_plan_free_banner_desc: Core profile and community. Motion limits apply; AI uses Dine Credits.
business_onboarding_required: Please add business name, phone, and location.
business_onboarding_city: City is still missing — wait for location detection or pick a fuller address.
rankings_paid_only: Only Paid Business subscribers are included in the ranking.
business_signup_err_fill_all: Please fill in all required fields
business_signup_err_details: Please search and select your business first.
dine_credits_dating_insufficient: Publishing a date invitation costs ${DATING_INVITATION_PUBLISH_CREDITS} Dine Credits. Add credits in your wallet (Settings → Dine Credits).
video_removed_from_library: Video removed. You can record a new one.
public_invitation_guests_hint: Public invitations appear in the feed; guests tap join on the card after you publish.
dine_credits_private_insufficient: Publishing a private invitation costs ${PRIVATE_INVITATION_PUBLISH_CREDITS} Dine Credits. Add credits in your wallet (Settings → Dine Credits).
dine_credits_private_banner: {{balance}} Dine Credits — publishing uses {{cost}} credits (free pool is used first).
credits_wallet_subtitle: One balance for invites, dates & AI
credit_hint_rate: 1 credit ≈ $0.01 USD when you buy packs.
credit_hint_free: Free credits: up to 20, +10 refreshed each month.
credit_hint_paid: Paid credits never expire. Free pool is used first.
credit_hint_uses: Same balance for private invites, dates & AI.
buy_credits_lead: Pay once — no subscription. Choose a pack below.
faq.title: Help & Support
faq.subtitle: Find answers to your questions and learn how to get the most out of DineBuddies.
credits_pricing_page_subtitle: Dine Credits are shared by all accounts: private invites, date invites, AI, and more. Buy packs in your wallet — final per-use pricing may be announced later.
dine_credits_wallet_card_body: Buy credit packs in one place. The same balance covers private invitations, date invitations, AI tools, and other in-app features.
dine_credits_use_hint: Used for private & date invites, AI, and boosts. Free pool is used first.
consumer_no_plans: Your Dine Credits pay for private invites, date invites, AI, and boosts — one balance (free + paid; free is used first). Partners use the same credit model from their wallet. Final per-use prices may be tuned later.
auth_business_portal_only: This account is a business account. Use Business sign-in (email and password), not personal login.
auth_consumer_portal_only: This email is not registered as a business account. Use personal sign-in or create a business account.
auth_affiliate_portal_only: This account must sign in from the affiliate partner portal only.
auth_personal_portal_only: This account must sign in with Google, Facebook, or Apple on the personal login page.
auth_business_email_conflict: This email is already registered as a business account. Use Business sign-in.
auth_affiliate_email_in_use: This email is registered as an affiliate partner. Use the affiliate sign-in page only.
